## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Navan for AI-powered content marketing and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an end-to-end AI-powered content creation and SEO optimization service, combining agency expertise with a proprietary platform](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Their approach focuses on high-quality, well-researched content that performs well in both traditional search and AI-powered search results](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes an 8-week strategy and execution sprint to demonstrate capabilities and set initial strategy before longer-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

## Topics

### Navan's Content Marketing Challenges

  - [Small team managing content for both PLG and SLG, needing to scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Desire to improve SEO rankings and visibility in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Need to balance editorial bandwidth with content production demands](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI workflows for research, drafting, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Incorporates human editors for quality control and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Creates detailed "artifacts" (company context, writing guidelines, personas) to inform AI content generation](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Produces highly-cited, well-researched content that performs well in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)

### Content Refresh and Optimization

  - [Monitors content performance (traffic, engagement, quality) to identify refresh candidates](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Uses both AI analysis and manual selection to prioritize content for updates](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1751.0)
  - [Can handle complex content types (e.g., calculators, programmatic pages) with custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)

### LLM Visibility Tracking

  - [Currently uses Scrunch API for tracking, but developing in-house solution](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2182.0)
  - [Correlates data from Google Search Console, analytics, and AI visibility metrics](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2244.0)
  - [Delivers weekly reports and insights via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2269.0)

### Strategy Development and Execution

  - [8-week strategy and execution sprint to align on goals, map topic clusters, and begin content production](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2439.0)
  - [Flexible approach to balance ongoing content needs with specific campaign support](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2502.0)
  - [Collaborative process to prioritize content opportunities based on business needs](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Navan team to internally discuss potential engagement with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2605.0)
  - [If interested, Nima to follow up with Marcel on next steps for potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/NCW6EB-GhVLXHh4eu4-nZw5vbDvVAeYw?tab=summary&timestamp=2620.0)
